script_text: Sentences in a text are not random. They link logically.
Each sentence adds to or follows the one before.
Words like also, however, and because signal connections.
They tell you how the next sentence relates.
However means a twist or surprise is coming.
The day was sunny. However, a storm was coming.
As you read, circle signal words. They show how ideas connect.
Now you are ready to spot logical connections!
